problem id: 43b9343e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  00101101 -> 10010100
  10010011 -> 11000000
  11101100 -> 01111000
  10011101 -> 11000111
  00010101 -> 10001011
  11000101 -> 11101110
  11001111 -> 11101011
  00010010 -> 00001000
  11010001 -> 11100101
  11011001 -> 11100001

query: 00010100
predicted answer: 00001011
